editorsPick.title: RAVEPOP
editorsPick.whyWatch: Ein elektrisierendes Album, das die Grenzen des Genres sprengt.
editorsPick.whyWatchEn: An electrifying album that pushes the boundaries of the genre.
editorsPick.audience: Fans von experimentellem Pop und elektronischer Musik
editorsPick.audienceEn: Fans of experimental pop and electronic music

editorsPick.title: DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)
editorsPick.whyWatch: Lil Nas X liefert unfertige, aber visionäre Tracks, die neugierig machen.
editorsPick.whyWatchEn: Lil Nas X delivers unfinished yet visionary tracks that spark curiosity.
editorsPick.audience: Pop- und Hip-Hop-Fans, die rohe Kreativität schätzen
editorsPick.audienceEn: Pop and hip-hop fans who appreciate raw creativity

hiddenGem.title: Thunk
hiddenGem.whyWatch: Ein skurriles Kollaborationsalbum voller Überraschungen und Tiefgang.
hiddenGem.whyWatchEn: A quirky collaboration album full of surprises and depth.
hiddenGem.audienceEn: Lovers of indie and avant-garde sounds

mostAnticipated.title: DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)
mostAnticipated.whyWatch: Lil Nas X setzt den Hype fort – selbst unfertig ein Ereignis.
mostAnticipated.whyWatchEn: Lil Nas X keeps the hype going – even unfinished, it's an event.
mostAnticipated.audienceEn: Mainstream audience and fans of the artist

familyChoice.title: Together Again
familyChoice.whyWatch: Herzerwärmende Folk-Klänge von zwei Legenden – perfekt für die ganze Familie.
familyChoice.whyWatchEn: Heartwarming folk sounds from two legends – perfect for the whole family.
familyChoice.audienceEn: Families and folk lovers of all ages
